buLanding.introLead: Welcome to Carmen’s self-learning portal. Content is organized by business unit so you can find guides and articles that match the product you actually use without mixing unrelated topics.
buLanding.introPoint1: Pick the business unit that applies to you from the cards below.
buLanding.introPoint2: You’ll land on that unit’s full category list and document structure.
buLanding.introPoint3: Open a category, then a guide, to follow steps, details, and screenshots.
buLanding.cardsSectionSubtitle: Each card shows the unit name and a short description. Click once to open that unit’s categories, then pick a topic to read the full guide.
buLanding.scrollHint: Scroll down to see business units
buLanding.cardFallback: Click the card to browse document categories for this unit.
buLanding.empty: No business units are available right now.
buLanding.whatIsLead: KB Carmen is built to help hotel teams access practical finance and accounting knowledge faster, aligned with the same Carmen principles: accuracy, operational efficiency, and auditability.
buLanding.whatIsSubLead: Its goal is simple: reduce trial-and-error, speed up onboarding, and keep teams working with one consistent operational standard.
buLanding.whatIsPoint1: Knowledge is organized by business unit and document category to reduce search time.
buLanding.whatIsPoint2: Guides explain connected workflows across PMS, API-ready integration, and accounting operations.
buLanding.whatIsPoint3: Supports cloud-based working and reporting habits teams already use in daily operations.
buLanding.whatIsPoint4: Helps new staff ramp up faster while keeping existing teams aligned to shared standards.

hero.title: Knowledge Hub
hero.subtitle: Search guides, articles, and answers for every question about using {buName} accounting management system
hero.compactTitle: Already know the topic or guide name?
hero.compactSubtitle: Type your search below. You don’t have to pick a business unit first.

quickHelp.title: Need more help?
quickHelp.subtitleLine1: If you can’t find the answer in the guide,
quickHelp.subtitleLine2: our support team is ready to help you 24/7.

category.selectDescription: Choose the category you want to learn
category.emptyListHint: The API returned an empty list. Check NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE on Vercel and that your hosted backend includes the same wiki markdown files as local.

errors.systemError: Temporary system error. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: This page may have been removed, renamed, or never existed.

activity.title: Activity Logs
activity.description: Usage and search history within the system (Business Unit: {bu})

modal.clear_desc: All messages in this room will be removed.

welcome.title: Hi! Carmen is here to help.
welcome.desc: Ask anything about the corporate manual or start a new conversation below.
default_suggestions: The refresh button in workbook doesn't work, what should I do?
Can I record purchase tax invoices in Excel and then import them?
Can Carmen upload files to the Revenue Department's RDPrep program?
Can I create a receipt without selecting an invoice?
Can I record a JV with unbalanced debit and credit?
